theme: monastery copying illuminated manuscripts at chosen years
title: Scriptorium Atlas: Exemplars and Glosses
strategies: single-exemplar baseline: keep only the Urtext (root) as a full copy, chain every recension upward to its source
popularity-ranked greedy: keep the Urtext plus the most-requested recensions the budget affords, always chain upward to the source (never reorient toward a descendant exemplar)

value-density facility location with directed shortest paths: multi-source Dijkstra over the asymmetric ascent/descent arc graph (letting each recension point at whichever neighbor -- source or derivative -- is cheapest), with exemplars chosen by weighted-savings per unit vellum cost, re-evaluated after each addition

reoriented local search: start from the popularity-ranked exemplar set, then repeatedly flip individual recensions' gloss direction (ascend <-> descend) whenever the neighbor-wise cost is asymmetric and cheaper the other way
